channel.title: modelsentry — AI Early Warning System
channel.description: Automated AI news and alerts for developers

item.title: Google Gemini Pricing Update: Flex and Priority Inference Tiers
item.description: A diff alert on Google Gemini pricing indicates the introduction of Flex and Priority inference tiers, potentially affecting cost and availability for users of the Gemini API. | Impact: medium | Signal: neutral | Why included: Pricing updates for major AI models like Gemini are crucial for developers and businesses managing their AI infrastructure costs.

item.title: Hackers breach Anthropic's 'too dangerous to release' Mythos AI model
item.description: Hackers have reportedly breached Anthropic's Mythos AI model, a model previously deemed 'too dangerous to release'. | Impact: high | Signal: negative | Why included: A breach of a 'too dangerous' AI model has significant security and ethical implications for the AI industry.

item.title: OpenAI deprecation notice: upcoming model shutdowns in 2026
item.description: OpenAI has issued a deprecation notice for upcoming model shutdowns in 2026, impacting users of their API services. | Impact: high | Signal: negative | Why included: This indicates a significant change in OpenAI's model offerings and will affect users who rely on the affected models.

item.title: Anthropic is A/B testing removing Claude Code from Pro plans
item.description: Anthropic is reportedly A/B testing the removal of Claude Code from its Pro plans, which could indicate changes in service offerings or pricing for premium users. | Impact: medium | Signal: negative | Why included: Changes to premium features for a significant AI model like Claude Code can impact user access and value propositions.

item.title: Anthropic now requires new Claude users to verify identity with photo ID
item.description: Anthropic has implemented a new policy requiring identity verification with photo ID for new Claude users, potentially impacting user onboarding and privacy. | Impact: medium | Signal: neutral | Why included: New identity verification requirements can affect user adoption and raise privacy considerations in the AI service landscape.

item.title: Anthropic has surged to a trillion-dollar valuation on secondary markets
item.description: Anthropic has reached a trillion-dollar valuation on secondary markets, reflecting significant investor confidence and market demand for its AI models. | Impact: medium | Signal: positive | Why included: A trillion-dollar valuation signifies major financial growth and validation of Anthropic's position in the AI industry.

item.title: Discord group claims it accessed Claude Mythos by guessing location
item.description: A Discord group claims to have accessed Anthropic's Mythos AI model by exploiting a potential location-based vulnerability. | Impact: high | Signal: negative | Why included: This claim suggests a potential security flaw in accessing sensitive AI models, which could have broad implications if true.

item.title: OpenAI model for masking personally identifiable information (PII) in text
item.description: OpenAI has introduced a new model, Privacy Filter, designed to automatically mask personally identifiable information (PII) in text. | Impact: medium | Signal: positive | Why included: This release addresses privacy concerns and could be valuable for applications handling sensitive user data.

item.title: OpenAI makes ChatGPT for Clinicians free for verified U.S. physicians
item.description: OpenAI is offering ChatGPT for Clinicians free of charge to verified U.S. physicians, nurse practitioners, and pharmacists, supporting clinical care and research. | Impact: medium | Signal: positive | Why included: Making specialized AI tools free for professionals can accelerate adoption and impact in critical sectors like healthcare.

item.title: Anthropic Pricing Page Diff Alert
item.description: A diff alert for Anthropic's pricing page shows no significant changes detected, indicating stability in their current pricing structure. | Impact: low | Signal: neutral | Why included: This diff alert shows no change in Anthropic's pricing, which is relevant for monitoring for potential future changes.

item.title: Anthropic investigates report of rogue access to hack-enabling Mythos AI
item.description: Anthropic is looking into reports that unauthorized users gained access to its Mythos AI model, which is described as 'hack-enabling'. This incident raises security concerns regarding the accessibility and control of advanced AI models. | Impact: high | Signal: negative | Why included: This is a high-impact security alert involving unauthorized access to a potentially sensitive AI model.

item.title: Ask HN: Any Open Source Claude Design Alternatives?
item.description: A user is seeking open-source alternatives for Claude's design, having found only one GitHub project so far. This indicates community interest in exploring different design approaches for AI systems. | Impact: low | Signal: neutral | Why included: This is a community discussion about open-source design alternatives for AI models.

item.title: In Search of (Claude's) Lost Time - Globalizing Claude's project memories
item.description: This article discusses globalizing Claude's project memories, suggesting an exploration of how AI models manage and potentially share project-related information across time and contexts. | Impact: low | Signal: neutral | Why included: This is a discussion about AI model memory and project management, relevant to the LLM industry's ongoing development.

item.title: Anthropic CVP – Run 2
item.description: This is a report on evaluation run 2 for Anthropic's CVP, likely referring to a model or system performance evaluation, indicating ongoing model development and testing by Anthropic. | Impact: low | Signal: neutral | Why included: This is a technical report on Anthropic's model evaluation, relevant to understanding their development progress.

item.title: Claude Cowork against your own cloud inference provider
item.description: This documentation provides an overview of Claude Cowork, detailing how to use it with your own cloud inference provider, which is significant for enterprise adoption and flexibility. | Impact: low | Signal: neutral | Why included: This is documentation for a feature that enables flexible deployment and integration of Claude's capabilities.

item.title: Show HN: Gemini Plugin for Claude Code
item.description: A developer created a Gemini plugin for Claude Code, allowing Claude Code to delegate tasks to the Gemini CLI. This demonstrates cross-platform integration and leveraging complementary AI capabilities. | Impact: medium | Signal: positive | Why included: This is a significant feature launch demonstrating integration between major LLM providers, expanding functionality.

item.title: Claude 4.7 blocks cyber prompts: before the fact vs. after the fact
item.description: This article discusses how Claude 4.7 handles cybersecurity prompts, detailing its proactive and reactive blocking mechanisms. It sheds light on the security features and safety measures implemented in advanced LLMs. | Impact: low | Signal: neutral | Why included: This is a discussion about the security and safety features of a specific LLM version.

item.title: Show HN: Open Chronicle – Local Screen Memory for Claude Code and Codex CLI
item.description: A developer built an open-source version of OpenAI Chronicle, focusing on local screen memory for Claude Code and Codex CLI. This highlights advancements in local AI tools and user privacy. | Impact: medium | Signal: positive | Why included: This is a launch of a new open-source tool for local AI, indicating growth in the privacy-focused AI tooling sector.

item.title: Is Claude Code going to cost $100/month? Probably not—it’s all very confusing
item.description: This article discusses confusion surrounding the pricing of Claude Code, with speculation about a $100/month cost. It highlights the complexity and potential lack of clarity in AI service pricing models. | Impact: medium | Signal: negative | Why included: This alerts to potential pricing changes or confusion for a significant AI product, impacting user costs.

item.title: Is Claude Code going to cost $100/month? Probably not - it's all very confusing
item.description: A discussion and analysis on the potential pricing of Claude Code, suggesting that a $100/month cost is unlikely but the pricing structure remains unclear. | Impact: medium | Signal: neutral | Why included: Pricing uncertainty for significant AI models like Claude Code can impact user planning and adoption.

item.title: Show HN: Govern Anthropic Managed Agents with 3 lines of code
item.description: A new SDK, govern(), has been released by AgentLattice to govern Anthropic Managed Agents with just three lines of code. This offers enhanced control and security for enterprise AI deployments. | Impact: medium | Signal: positive | Why included: This is a release of a new tool that enhances governance and security for enterprise AI deployments.

item.title: OpenAI Under Criminal Probe in Florida over Mass Shooter's ChatGPT Use
item.description: OpenAI is reportedly under criminal investigation in Florida due to the use of ChatGPT by a mass shooter. This raises serious ethical and legal questions regarding AI misuse and accountability. | Impact: high | Signal: negative | Why included: This is a high-impact legal and ethical alert concerning AI misuse and its potential societal consequences.

item.title: Anthropic tests how devs react to yanking Claude Code from Pro plan
item.description: Anthropic is reportedly testing developer reactions to removing Claude Code from its Pro plan. This could significantly impact user access and pricing for AI coding tools. | Impact: high | Signal: negative | Why included: This is a high-impact alert as it suggests a potential removal of a feature from a popular AI product, impacting users.

item.title: Anthropic's Mythos model accessed by unauthorized users
item.description: Bloomberg reports that unauthorized users have gained access to Anthropic's Mythos model, raising significant security concerns about the containment and access controls of advanced AI models. | Impact: high | Signal: negative | Why included: This is a high-impact security alert regarding unauthorized access to a specific AI model, indicating potential vulnerabilities.

item.title: Ravix – An AI agent that runs on your Claude Code subscription (alpha)
item.description: Ravix is a new AI agent that operates on existing Claude Code subscriptions, offering an autonomous agent experience without additional API keys or billing. This simplifies agent deployment for users. | Impact: medium | Signal: positive | Why included: This is a release of a new AI agent that leverages existing subscriptions, indicating innovation in AI agent accessibility.

item.title: Webby Person of the Year: Claude
item.description: Claude has been recognized as the Webby Person of the Year, a significant achievement highlighting its impact and recognition in the digital and AI space. | Impact: medium | Signal: positive | Why included: This is a significant award recognizing the impact and influence of Claude in the AI industry.

item.title: Unauthorized group has gained access to Anthropic's exclusive cyber tool Mythos
item.description: Multiple reports indicate that an unauthorized group accessed Anthropic's exclusive cyber tool, Mythos. This raises serious security concerns and highlights potential vulnerabilities in sensitive AI tools. | Impact: high | Signal: negative | Why included: This is a high-impact security alert regarding unauthorized access to a specialized AI tool, indicating potential risks.

item.title: Submit your startup profile with Claude or ChatGPT. 60 seconds or less
item.description: A tool is available that uses Claude or ChatGPT to help submit startup profiles in under 60 seconds. This showcases the application of LLMs in streamlining business processes. | Impact: low | Signal: positive | Why included: This demonstrates a practical application of LLMs in automating business processes, relevant to AI adoption.

item.title: Claude Code is no longer a part of the Pro plan
item.description: Claude Code has reportedly been removed from the Pro plan, a change that could impact users who relied on this feature within their subscription. | Impact: high | Signal: negative | Why included: This is a high-impact alert as it indicates a feature removal from a paid plan, potentially affecting user access and value.

item.title: Claude Code Removed from $20-a-Month "Pro" Subscription for New Users
item.description: Claude Code has been removed from the $20/month 'Pro' subscription for new users. This change signifies a potential shift in Anthropic's product strategy and pricing. | Impact: high | Signal: negative | Why included: This is a high-impact alert concerning a pricing change that affects feature availability for a significant user base.

item.title: Claude Code to be removed from Pro Tier?
item.description: There are discussions and reports suggesting that Claude Code might be removed from the Pro tier subscription. This potential change is causing significant community discussion. | Impact: high | Signal: negative | Why included: This alert signals a potential feature removal from a paid tier, which could significantly impact user perception and value.

item.title: OpenAI launches Codex Labs, partners with Accenture, PwC, Infosys, and others to help enterprises deploy and scale Codex across the software development lifecycle, and hits 4M Codex WAU.
item.description: OpenAI has launched Codex Labs and partnered with major consulting firms to facilitate enterprise adoption of Codex. The product has also reached 4 million weekly active users, indicating significant market traction. | Impact: medium | Signal: positive | Why included: This indicates a significant partnership and milestone for OpenAI's enterprise offerings, signaling strong market adoption.

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.116 Release Notes
item.description: Claude Code version 2.1.116 introduces significant performance improvements for '/resume' on large sessions, faster MCP startup, smoother fullscreen scrolling in VS Code, Cursor, and Windsurf terminals, and an improved thinking spinner for inline progress. It also includes security enhancements, bug fixes for rendering and keyboard shortcuts, and improvements to slash command behavior and plugin dependency management. | Impact: low | Signal: positive | Why included: This is a significant update to a developer tool for a major LLM, introducing performance and security improvements.

item.title: llm-openrouter 0.6
item.description: An update to the llm-openrouter library to version 0.6 has been released. This likely includes improvements or changes to how LLMs are accessed via OpenRouter. | Impact: low | Signal: neutral | Why included: This is a library update relevant to accessing LLMs through a specific platform.

item.title: Anthropic Claude Code Leak Reveals Critical Command Injection Vulnerabilities
item.description: A leak of Anthropic's Claude Code has exposed critical command injection vulnerabilities within the system. | Impact: high | Signal: negative | Why included: A security vulnerability in a major LLM model is a high-impact event.

item.title: LLM-Rosetta - Translate LLM API Calls Across OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini
item.description: A new tool, LLM-Rosetta, has been developed to translate LLM API calls between different providers like OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini, aiming to simplify adapter maintenance. | Impact: medium | Signal: positive | Why included: A new tool simplifying API integration across major LLM providers is a notable development in the ecosystem.

item.title: OpenAI Executive Kevin Weil Is Leaving the Company
item.description: OpenAI executive Kevin Weil is departing the company. | Impact: low | Signal: neutral | Why included: Executive departures at major AI companies can sometimes signal shifts in strategy or focus, though this is a low-impact event on its own.

item.title: The LLM costs are not going up
item.description: An article argues that LLM costs are actually decreasing, contrary to potential assumptions. | Impact: medium | Signal: positive | Why included: Information about LLM cost trends is crucial for understanding market dynamics and adoption rates.

item.title: NSA using Anthropic's Mythos despite blacklist
item.description: The NSA is reportedly using Anthropic's Mythos, despite the model being blacklisted. | Impact: medium | Signal: negative | Why included: The use of a blacklisted model by a government agency raises security and compliance concerns.

item.title: Anthropic installed a spyware bridge on my machine?
item.description: A user alleges that Anthropic installed a 'spyware bridge' on their machine. | Impact: high | Signal: negative | Why included: Allegations of spyware from a major AI company are a serious security concern.

item.title: Claude Token Counter, now with model comparisons
item.description: A Claude token counter tool has been updated to include comparisons across different models. | Impact: medium | Signal: positive | Why included: A tool that facilitates model comparison for token usage is useful for developers optimizing costs and performance.

item.title: Claude Token Counter, now with model comparisons
item.description: The Claude Token Counter tool has been updated to include comparisons between different Claude models. | Impact: low | Signal: positive | Why included: This is a useful tool update for developers working with Claude, providing added functionality for model comparison.

item.title: OpenAI helps Hyatt advance AI among colleagues
item.description: Hyatt is deploying ChatGPT Enterprise across its global workforce, leveraging GPT-5.4 and Codex to enhance productivity, streamline operations, and improve guest experiences. | Impact: medium | Signal: positive | Why included: This signifies a major enterprise adoption of OpenAI's technology, indicating real-world business value and market penetration.

item.title: Banned by Anthropic?
item.description: A website appears to list users who have been banned by Anthropic. | Impact: low | Signal: neutral | Why included: Information about platform bans can be relevant for users interacting with AI services.

item.title: Claude UI Feature Request
item.description: A user suggests adding tagging functionality to the Claude UI to improve conversation searching and organization. | Impact: low | Signal: positive | Why included: User feedback on UI improvements for major LLMs is relevant for product development and user experience.

item.title: What Anthropic's Mythos and Project Glasswing Mean for Your Apple Devices
item.description: An analysis explores the implications of Anthropic's Mythos and Project Glasswing for Apple devices. | Impact: medium | Signal: neutral | Why included: New developments from Anthropic impacting major hardware platforms like Apple are of significant interest.

item.title: Show HN: Lmcli v0.5.0 – A useable tool for LLM minimalists
item.description: Lmcli v0.5.0 has been released, described as a usable tool for LLM minimalists, now featuring image support. | Impact: medium | Signal: positive | Why included: A new version of an LLM tool with added image support is a relevant update for developers working with LLMs.

item.title: Claude is skeptical about OpenClaw
item.description: This blog post discusses Claude's perceived skepticism towards a technology or project named OpenClaw. | Impact: low | Signal: neutral | Why included: This item is relevant as it mentions Claude, a prominent LLM, in the context of a discussion about another technology.

item.title: Android 15's hidden Linux Terminal is a real Debian VM – and it runs Claude Code
item.description: Android 15 includes a hidden Linux Terminal that functions as a Debian VM and can run Claude Code. | Impact: medium | Signal: positive | Why included: This is relevant as it showcases the integration of LLM code (Claude Code) within a mobile operating system's terminal, indicating broader application and accessibility.

item.title: Show HN: Fuelgauge – a Claude Code status line that doesn't need Node
item.description: A new tool called Fuelgauge provides a Claude Code status line that operates without requiring Node.js. | Impact: medium | Signal: positive | Why included: This is relevant as it's a new tool for Claude Code, indicating ecosystem development and improved developer experience.
